_comment: Two DIFFERENT people who share the name 'John Doe'. John Doe A appears in 3 sources (a recruiter CSV row + an ATS record + a resume, all linked by john.doe@alpha.com); John Doe B in 2 (a recruiter CSV row + recruiter notes, linked by john.doe@beta.com). They must resolve to TWO separate profiles — never fused on the shared name.
